# Nelson Freight — Email Intelligence Platform

> NVOCC freight forwarding Vietnam→USA/Canada. Excel VBA ERP v14 + Python FastAPI + DuckDB + Email pipeline. 656 pytest tests + Rubberduck VBA tests. OneDrive is canonical source for live ERP files.

## Architecture

- [SYSTEM_STANDARDS.md](docs/SYSTEM_STANDARDS.md): Single source of truth for system standards, canonical paths, and rules
- [Nelson Architecture](docs/DATA_FLOW.md): 3-tier architecture — CODE (Engine_test), DATA (OneDrive/NelsonData), LOCAL

## Email Pipeline

- [EMAIL PIPELINE SOURCE OF TRUTH](docs/EMAIL_PIPELINE_SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md): Complete email flow — send, scan, bounce, reply, suppression
- [EMAIL DASHBOARD V7](docs/EMAIL_DASHBOARD_V7.md): Dashboard 9 tabs, local web server port 8100
- [EMAIL DASHBOARD V7 WORKFLOW](docs/EMAIL_DASHBOARD_V7_WORKFLOW.md): Daily rotation workflow, Smart Send 700/day
- [Email Dashboard Versioning](docs/email-dashboard-versioning.md): Version contract — filename fixed, version in code only

## Smart Send

- [SMART SEND CONTRACT](docs/contracts/SMART_SEND_CONTRACT.md): Smart Send flow contract — preview, confirm, batch send
- [Rate Pipeline Contract](docs/rate-pipeline-contract.md): Rate builder return keys and schema

## Email Routing

- [commodity_groups.yaml](email_engine/config/commodity_groups.yaml): YAML config — 8 canonical commodity groups + POL patterns + ARB origins + VN domestic ports. Edit this file to add/change groups without code changes.
- [normalize_commodity()](email_engine/core/rule_engine.py): Maps 17 raw COMMODITY_CATEGORY values → 8 canonical groups (FLOORING/FURNITURE/PLASTIC/RUBBER/PLYWOOD/FOOD/GARMENT/CANDLE/OTHERS)
- [pol_from_campaign()](email_engine/core/rule_engine.py): Extracts POL/country/ARB from CAMPAIGN_ID (MY/TH/CN/KH patterns)
- [/api/routing/preview](email_engine/web_server.py): Returns routing decision for a contact email — POL, country, ARB surcharge, POD lanes
- [ARB Origin Mapping](docs/ARB_ORIGIN_MAPPING.md): ARB port codes and origin mapping (shanghai/ningbo/lat_krabang/port_klang/phnom_penh)

## Data

- [MASTER V7 SCHEMA](docs/MASTER_V7_SCHEMA.md): Master file schema (contact_unified_v7.xlsx)
- [Panjiva Export Guide](docs/PANJIVA_EXPORT_GUIDE.md): Panjiva data extraction pipeline

## ERP

- [ERP v14 Source of Truth](docs/erp-v14-source-of-truth.md): ERP v14 live on OneDrive, refresh scripts
- [ERP VBA Standards](docs/ERP_V14_VBA_STANDARDS.md): VBA coding standards for ERP v14
- [VBA Gotchas](docs/vba-gotchas.md): Known VBA pitfalls (Declarations before Subs, etc.)

## Test Infrastructure

- [docs/test-infrastructure-audit.md](docs/test-infrastructure-audit.md): Audit findings — 5 custom runner files converted to pytest (53 new tests added → 709 total collectible), COM scripts moved to scripts/com-e2e/
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Test requirements — Python: pytest markers; VBA: Rubberduck TestModule_<Feature>.bas required for each bas<Feature>.bas
- [.pre-commit-config.yaml](.pre-commit-config.yaml): pytest collection check hook + no-sys-exit enforcement
- [docs/vba-rubberduck-guide.md](docs/vba-rubberduck-guide.md): Rubberduck install, write tests, Test Explorer, naming convention
- [ERP/vba-v14-mirror/basShared.bas](ERP/vba-v14-mirror/basShared.bas): Shared VBA constants + test harness helpers (MsgBoxOrSilent, COL_* indices)
- [ERP/vba-v14-mirror/TestModule_Template.bas](ERP/vba-v14-mirror/TestModule_Template.bas): Template for new VBA Rubberduck test modules
- [ERP/vba-v14-mirror/TestModule_CostBreakdown.bas](ERP/vba-v14-mirror/TestModule_CostBreakdown.bas): Full Rubberduck tests — HDL rules (7), wharfage (5), cost breakdown (4) = 16 test cases total
- [ERP/vba-v14-mirror/CostBreakdown.bas](ERP/vba-v14-mirror/CostBreakdown.bas): HDL fee + wharfage engine — tested by TestModule_CostBreakdown.bas
- [scripts/com-e2e/v14_ribbon_e2e.py](scripts/com-e2e/v14_ribbon_e2e.py): COM E2E — tests A-F Win/Lost/Expired on live ERP v14 via win32com

## Development

- [Setup PC Home](docs/SETUP_PC_HOME.md): Development environment setup
- [ERP Automation Test Stack](docs/erp-automation-test-stack.md): Testing framework for ERP automation
- [Feature Checklist](docs/feature-checklist.md): Development checklist for new features
- [Known Legacy Failures](docs/known-legacy-failures.md): Known issues in legacy code (QuoteImage VBA not ported to v4 COL layout)

- [Webapp Upgrade Roadmap](docs/webapp-upgrade-roadmap.md): Next.js dashboard roadmap

- [MiniMax Cheatsheet](docs/minimax-cheatsheet.md): MiniMax M2.7 sidecar commands and quota

- [Domain Data](docs/contracts/DOMAIN-DATA.md): Data domain rules

- [Domain Code](docs/contracts/DOMAIN-CODE.md): Code domain rules

- [Charge Name Source of Truth](docs/CHARGE_NAME_SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md): Charge name mappings
